scope_PH01.rationale: Coherent scope — HD-001 + HD-007 are documented as sister deltas in HD-007's '## Sequence' as 'SHIPS IN THE SAME BATCH 5 COMMIT'. The two HDs share VerifyContext / VerifyResult shapes; splitting them would create an awkward interim. New HD markdown files travel with the implementation.

size_PH02.rationale: 501-1000 line band, 5 files. Single coherent refactor + extension. Not in the 'too big to review safely' band; the test suite scopes the blast radius.

safety_PH03.rationale: No DB migrations, no schema/IDL changes, no infra files, no secrets. Behaviour-preservation claim (--enable-gate-handoff opt-in default) is validated by the 9 unchanged failure-path tests.

completeness_PH04.rationale: 5 new tests added in test_train_failure_paths.py covering HD-001 (phase function existence + cmd_run shrinkage) and HD-007 (gate boundary pause + mark-gates-complete success + mark-gates-complete critical-found). Test count delta 288→293 = +5; HD-001's claim of '287→292' is off-by-one on baseline but delta is correct.

mechanical_baseline_CR01.python_syntax: PASS (py_compile clean on both _wpxlib.py and wpx-train)
mechanical_baseline_CR01.pytest_head: 292 passed, 1 failed (pre-existing flake test_train_lock_second_acquisition_raises — verified independent of Batch 5 by re-running on stashed baseline)
mechanical_baseline_CR01.coverage_gap: No type-checker available locally; project has no pyproject.toml at scripts root. Recommend adding ruff + mypy to plugin/sulis-execution as a follow-up — but this is pre-existing and out of scope for Batch 5 review.

verdict_drivers: HD-010 CRITICAL (silent data-loss in cmd_mark_gates_complete) → minimum verdict: Block; orchestrator awareness lowers to Request changes per the founder's stated 'will be addressed before commit' for the related SDK gap

architecture.summary: HD-001 split is clean — phase boundaries explicit, dataclasses well-typed, dispatcher seam in place for MQ. HD-007 boundary placement (Option B / mark-gates-complete) is the right choice; cmd_resume + cmd_abort correctly handle the new phase. Gaps: HD-010 (ImportError-swallowed data loss); HD-012 (SDK contract drift).

security.summary: Nothing surfaced. No secrets, no new external calls, no auth-shape changes. The mark-gates-complete subcommand is a pure state-machine transition + YAML write.

quality.summary: HD-001's '<120 LOC' sizing test is well-conceived. HD-011 (render dict missing verifying_gates; dead code_review entry). Pre-existing flake unrelated to this batch.
